step.name: audit-data-quality
step.action: List issues without estimates, status=Done + resolution=Unresolved, status=In Progress + no assignee. If >5% of sprint size → abort with "fix data first" alert.
step.decision-gate: If FIX-DATA-FIRST → halt the pipeline; do not generate the report.

step.name: lock-schema
step.action: Read status enum, threshold table, metric list, archival path, dashboard URL. No ad-hoc additions.

step.name: fetch-read-only
step.action: Paginate until done. Persist raw JSON to disk with timestamp before computing.

step.name: compute-multi-metric-health
step.action: Compute completion_rate, scope_creep (issues added after day 2), blocked_count. Apply thresholds → status enum.

step.name: validate
step.action: Check committed>0, fetch_errors==0, sprint_start_date<=today. If any fails → error alert + exit non-zero.
step.decision-gate: On validation fail → DO NOT deliver; alert engineering and stop.

step.name: archive
step.action: Write to durable store (S3/Notion/GitHub issue/repo path) with sprint id + timestamp.

step.name: deliver
step.action: Post Block-Kit (chunk >3000 chars) to Slack OR push to BI sink. For executive reports, route to human checkpoint queue with 1-2 sentence narrative slot.
